name: spectron
description: Connect Codex to Spectron and capture conversation turns

interface.shortDescription: Connect Codex to Spectron with automatic turn capture.
interface.longDescription: Use the Spectron plugin to connect Codex to the MCP server exposed by your Spectron instance and automatically capture conversation turns through bundled lifecycle hooks. The user-provided instance URL is the source of truth and should point to an endpoint such as https://<instance>/mcp.
